checklist_items.title: Verify on-chain identity linking for Forum actions
checklist_items.description: Check if users must link a verifiable on-chain identity (e.g., wallet address with a minimum stake/history) to their forum account before submitting RFRVs or participating in proposal voting.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration settings, user interface screenshots showing required linking, or process documentation.

checklist_items.title: Review SSO configuration for Governance Forum
checklist_items.description: If Single Sign-On (SSO) is used for Governance Forum authentication as a mitigation, review its configuration to ensure strong identity verification and secure session management practices are enforced.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: SSO provider configuration details, integration code review, or security audit report of the SSO setup.
